name: GRP Limited
summary: GRP Limited manufactures and sells reclaim rubber sheets for tire and non-tire rubber goods industries in India and internationally. It operates through Reclaim Rubber and Others segments. The company offers reclaim rubber products, such as natural rubber reclaim, synthetic rubber reclaim, and polycoat rubber for use in inner liners and tubes, tire side walls and piles, tire treads and retreads, conveyor belts, moulded goods, adhesives, and footwear, as well as rubber mattings, profiles, and roofing. It also provides industrial polymers comprising glass filled and unfilled reprocessed nylon 6 and modified nylon 6,6 used in automotive, electrical and electronics, consumer goods, and industrial applications. In addition, the company offers custom die forms consisting of link, door, and industrial mats, as well as dock bumpers primarily for use in civil and agricultural industries. Further, it generates power from windmill, as well as offers thermoplastic elastomers. The company was formerly known as Gujarat Reclaim and Rubber Products Limited and changed its name to GRP Limited in June 2012. GRP Limited was founded in 1974 and is based in Mumbai, India.
